---
name: Epic
about: Issue for Epic
title: "[M?][Epic] <Epic Name>"
labels: Epic
assignees: KevMP

---

## Summary
- <1–2 sentences. What capability area does this epic deliver?>

## Milestone
- <M0 / M1 / M2 / M3>

## Goal
- <Why this epic exists. What does it unlock for downstream systems?>

## Deliverable
- <What “done” looks like at a capability level (not implementation).>
- <Optionally: the demo scenario this epic enables.>

## In scope
- <Bullets of what is included. Stay at capability / contract level.>

## Out of scope
- <Bullets of what is explicitly NOT included (even if related).>

## Interfaces / Surfaces
- <List public modules/APIs/events this epic owns or introduces.>
- <If unknown yet: “TBD (will be captured in first story)”>

## Definition of Done (epic-level)
- [ ] All child stories for this epic are closed
- [ ] Required tests exist for all shipped surfaces (unit/integration as appropriate)
- [ ] One docs issue for this epic is completed and linked below
- [ ] Sample usage path is documented (or demo’d in a sample place if relevant)

## Dependencies / Prereqs
- <Other epics/stories that must land first. If none, “None”.>

## Risks / Open questions
- <Bullets. Keep short. Link decision issues if needed.>

## Stories
- (Child issues go here as a checklist or sub-issues)
- [ ] <E1 / T1 / etc. — title>
- [ ] <…>

## Documentation
- [ ] <Link to the docs story issue for this epic>

## Notes
- <Optional. Keep short.>
